category_sources: Official project site describes Sagittarius Scheme as an R6RS/R7RS Scheme implementation.
source_facts.description says it is a free Scheme implementation supporting R6RS and R7RS.
display_name_sources: Official project site and GitHub repository use Sagittarius Scheme.
docs_sources: Official project site links Sagittarius Users' Manual.
Official users reference says it is the manual for Sagittarius, an R6RS/R7RS Scheme implementation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ktakashi/sagittarius-scheme; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official project site describes practical libraries and the users reference for the Scheme implementation.
source_facts.description identifies Scheme and R6RS/R7RS support.
